lessonQuizMerge.storageShape: sections JSON may use nnLessonPayloadV2 wrapper with sections, preTest, postTest arrays
lessonQuizMerge.writePath: sectionsToDbJson(sectionArr, nextPre, nextPost) preserves section list; only pre/post arrays grow

slotBehavior.pre: items append to preTest; postTest unchanged except when building merged arrays
slotBehavior.post: items append to postTest; preTest unchanged

lessonQuizMerge.implementationNote: nextPre = slot === 'post' ? basePre : [...basePre, ...items]; nextPost = slot === 'post' ? [...basePost, ...items] : basePost
lessonQuizMerge.safety: Does not replace sections array with items-only payload; malformed lesson_quiz rows quarantine with lesson_quiz_incomplete

activityPool.stemHash: Pool activities now set stemHash via stemHash(stem) (runtime ReferenceError fix)
activityPool.dedupe: Same as questions: flushQuestionBatch stemHash uniqueness
